title: LOW: No Permissions-Policy header
description:
## Location
src/server.rs, security_headers middleware (lines 62-82)

## Finding
The security_headers middleware does not set a Permissions-Policy (formerly Feature-Policy) header. This header restricts browser features like camera, microphone, geolocation, etc.

## Impact
Very low. Broadside serves minimal HTML (index and profile pages) with no JavaScript. The CSP already blocks scripts via `default-src 'none'`. This is defense-in-depth only.

## Recommendation
Add `Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()` or similar restrictive policy. This is a best-practice hardening measure, not a functional vulnerability.
close_reason: Delegated to reverse proxy. Browser feature restrictions are infrastructure-level headers best set once at the proxy. Both Caddy and nginx examples in README now include Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(). The finding itself rated impact as 'very low' given CSP already blocks scripts.
